zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Raynel於1040年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾時，她的父親Arnoul De Reynel II31歲，母親Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent28歲。她和Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1103年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Raynel于1040年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內雷恩爾时，她的父亲Arnoul De Reynel II31岁，母亲Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent28岁。她和Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1103年在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from an inflected form of German rein or central Yiddish rayn ‘pure’.

variants.name: Renner
meanings: English, German, and Swiss German: from an agent derivative of Middle English, Middle High German rennen ‘to run’, hence an occupational name for a messenger, normally a mounted and armed military servant. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).
English and German: variant of English   Rayner  , German   Reiner  .

variants.name: Raynor
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Rainer, Reiner, Renier (ancient Germanic Raginhari, from ragin ‘counsel’ + hari, heri ‘army’). The surname was later much confused with Reynold and Renard .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Raynel was born in 1040, in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Arnoul De Reynel II, was 31 and her mother, Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. She died about 1103, in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Raynel est née en 1040, à Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Arnoul De Reynel II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. Elle est décédée environ 1103, à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Raynel 1040 in Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnoul De Reynel II 31 und ihre Mutter Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent 28. Sie hatte mit Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1103 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Raynel è nata il nel 1040 nel Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Arnoul De Reynel II, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. Morì circa 1103, nel Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Raynelが1040年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンレイネルで生まれた時，父Arnoul De Reynel IIは31歳，母Mrs Arnoul De Fouventは28歳であった。彼女はGeoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinvilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1103年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Raynel(이)가 1040년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 리넬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoul De Reynel II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1103년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Raynel nasceu em 1040, em Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Arnoul De Reynel II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1103, em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Raynel родилась в 1040 г. в местности ринель, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Arnoul De Reynel II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. Она умерла около 1103 г. в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Raynel nació en 1040, en Reynel, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Arnoul De Reynel II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs Arnoul De Fouvent, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Geoffroi "de Chateau-Neuf" seigneur de Joinville. Murió aproximadamente 1103, en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 64 años.
